name: Danish Rye Cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except raisins, ricotta and sugar in a saucepan.
2. Mix well.
3. Heat to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to simmer and cook, covered, for 1 hour. Stir occasionally; add more water if needed to prevent scorching.
5. During the last 15 minutes of cooking time, add raisins.
6. Top each serving with a dollop of ricotta cheese and sugar, if desired.
